title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability improvements and expanding automation capabilities. OpsPal resolved license activation issues that could cause system interruptions, and significantly enhanced the Skills library with 98 updated automation templates to help RevOps teams build workflows faster.

entries.headline: License activation now works smoothly without interruptions
details: Your OpsPal license activates properly on the first try and warns you 48 hours before expiration so you never lose access unexpectedly

entries.headline: Skills library expanded with 98 enhanced automation templates
details: Build workflows faster with improved templates for sales planning, Salesforce integration, and dozens of other common RevOps tasks
